headlines.description: — Tua Tagovailoa may have to consider making a helmet visor more than a one-time addition to his uniform.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tua Tagovailoa throws 4 TD passes as Dolphins overwhelm Falcons 34-10 to end 3-game losing streak

events.name: New York Jets at Cincinnati Bengals

headlines.description: — The winless start for the New York Jets took a toll on Justin Fields. At one point in the runup to Sunday's game in Cincinnati, he found himself laying down in his closet and crying.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hall and Fields help the Jets edge the Bengals 39-38 for their 1st win of the season

events.name: Cleveland Browns at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel wanted to add energy in Gillette Stadium after watching his team lose two of its first three games at home to open the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Drake Maye throws 3 TDs as Patriots overcome Myles Garrett's 5-sack game in 32-13 win over Browns

events.name: New York Giants at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: — Saquon Barkley burst free for a 65-yard touchdown on his first carry and topped 100 yards rushing for the first time this season before he left with a groin injury, the kind of setback that...
headlines.shortLinkText: Saquon Barkley breaks out with 150 yards before hurting groin as Eagles pound Giants 38-20

headlines.description: — A little rest proved just what Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills needed.
headlines.shortLinkText: James Cook runs for 216 yards and 2 TDs, Allen accounts for 3 TDs as Bills rout Panthers 40-9

headlines.description: — In what they hope will be their final game before Lamar Jackson returns, the Baltimore Ravens finally looked pretty good without him.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tyler Huntley leads Ravens past Bears 30-16, Derrick Henry scores 2 TDs for Baltimore

headlines.description: — With star receiver Nico Collins out Sunday against San Francisco, the Houston Texans needed someone to step up to make up for his absence.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stroud has season-high 318 yards passing with two TDs to lead the Texans over the 49ers 26-15

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Anthony Nelson will have to settle for watching replays of one of the best plays of his seven-year NFL career — because he couldn't really recall how it all happened in real time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Anthony Nelson and the Buccaneers' defense shine in a 23-3 victory over the struggling Saints

headlines.description: — A trio of rookies came up big in the Denver Broncos' 44-24 rout of the Dallas Cowboys on Sunday for their fifth consecutive victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bo Nix and rookies lead Broncos to 44-24 victory over Cowboys, extending home win streak to 9

headlines.description: — Jonathan Taylor embraced having a lighter workload and a shorter day Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jonathan Taylor scores 3 TDs as Colts pound Titans 38-14 and move to NFL-best 7-1

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Pittsburgh Steelers

headlines.description: — Jordan Love spent three years absorbing what he could from Aaron Rodgers. Footwork. Cadence. Throwing motion. Film study. The list of things Love gleaned from his mentor goes on and on, every last item invaluable in Love's development.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aaron Rodgers and the Steelers fall short in QB's reunion with Packers as Love leads 35-25 win
